# db-backup

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN тАФ do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Backup non-worktree Postgres databases to ~/.backups/singularity/. Backup non-worktree Postgres databases to ~/.backups/singularity/.
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `dbBackupPane`
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` `db-backup`
  - `Debug.Item` "DB Backup"
  - `dbBackupPane.open`
- Server:
  - Uses: `database.adminPool`, `database.libpqSubprocessEnv`
  - `GET /api/debug/backup-db`
  - `POST /api/debug/backup-db`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
